name: Succotash (Dave's)
recipeIngredient: 1 Season with salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetables through and mix thoroughly. Add the prepared vegetable white sauce and mix.
2. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat, cover, and keep warm until ready to serve.
This is an old home recipe, made in large quantities at Thanksgiving and Christmas. The kids have always loved it and have invariably asked for the recipe after they have moved away.
